overall.description: A first-person perspective from the enclosed bridge of a vessel navigating through rough, stormy seas at night. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, with the ship's bow pitching in heavy swell. The footage appears to be from a maritime simulation game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward deck view

events.description: vessel pitches sharply downward as it descends from a wave crest into a trough
ship rolls to starboard as it encounters another large swell

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and steering through rough seas while monitoring the radar display

entered.detail: leftmost display showing nautical chart with yellow landmasses and blue water
center circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep arm
rightmost display showing ship telemetry and depth data
dark structural pillar framing the left side of the forward windows
dark structural pillar framing the right side of the forward windows
metal deck of the ship's bow with railings and equipment visible through the window
rough stormy sea with visible whitecaps and rolling waves

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady first-person view from within the enclosed bridge of a vessel transiting through heavy seas at night. Three navigation monitors displaying charts, radar, and ship data are mounted overhead. The vessel pitches and rolls significantly as it encounters large swells, with the bow deck rising and falling against the dark, turbulent ocean visible through the forward windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from within a vessel's bridge as it battles a turbulent, dark ocean at night. It begins with a view of the enclosed bridge, where three overhead navigation monitors display active charts, radar, and ship data. As the vessel pushes forward, the camera captures the ship pitching and rolling significantly in response to the heavy seas. The scene then emphasizes the violent motion of the journey, with the bow deck rising and falling sharply against the dark, churning swells visible through the forward windows.
